result.status_detail: PASS_BLOCKED — warning rendered with 차단, LLM response blocked (no passthrough)
result.warning_text: 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.

notes: W5.2 regression baseline check. grok matched W5.1/W5.0 baseline outcome class (PASS_BLOCKED). Engine intercept fired: URL rewrote to grok.com/?rid=00000000-apf0-warn-0000-000000000002 and warning '민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.' rendered with 차단 keyword; Grok's native '응답을 완료하지 못했습니다' error confirms LLM response was blocked (no passthrough). Op note: Grok SPA rendered blank after hard-reload/F5; clean address-bar navigation recovered render. New chat used; clipboard paste + Enter submit. CDP:9222 belongs to a separate Chrome instance (not the foreground default Chrome holding Grok), so GUI automation used. windows-mcp Scrape DOM and direct-coordinate Click(loc) both unusable in this env (tool bugs); element-label clicks + clipboard paste worked.
